findings.title: Password comparison with == operator
findings.description: Non-constant-time password comparison is a critical auth anti-pattern in AI code.

findings.title: Python Unsafe Deserialization
findings.description: Unsafe deserialization detected. pickle.loads, yaml.load without SafeLoader, and marshal.loads can execute arbitrary code when processing untrusted data. Use yaml.safe_load() for YAML, or json for serialization where possible.

findings.title: Python None Attribute Access
findings.description: Potential None dereference. The value may be None (e.g., from dict.get()) and accessing attributes on None raises AttributeError. Add a None check.
